title: Law of Identity
statement: A defined thing, symbol, or reference is identical to itself within a stable context.
stabilisation_status: sound and foundational, with boundary notes added
review_notes: Clarified identity as self-identity within a stable context of reference.
Added boundary distinctions from equivalence, similarity, equality of quantity, and persistence through time.
Retained no dependencies in current UTE structure.
Future refinement may introduce a deeper reference or definition layer.
